---
title: "TMA CODEX - Visualization"
author: "Paul Marcoux"
date: today
date-format: "DD MM YYYY"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
  column: page
jupyter: sopa
---

# TMA CODEX Visualization

## Configuration and package loading

```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
sc.settings.verbosity = 0
```

```{python}
def plot_spatial_grid(adata, rows=10, cols=4, dpi=100, size=0.5):
    rows_labels = [chr(ord("A") + r) for r in range(rows)]
    cols_labels = [str(c) for c in range(1, cols + 1)]
    n_clusters = int(adata.obs["leiden"].nunique())
    palette = plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"]
    cluster_colors = {str(i): palette[i % len(palette)] for i in range(n_clusters)}
    all_coords = adata.obsm.get("spatial", adata.obsm["spatial_um"])
    x_min, x_max = all_coords[:, 0].min(), all_coords[:, 0].max()
    y_min, y_max = all_coords[:, 1].min(), all_coords[:, 1].max()
    x_range = x_max - x_min
    y_range = y_max - y_min

    fig_w = cols * 3
    fig_h = rows * 3
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(rows, cols, figsize=(fig_w, fig_h), dpi=dpi)
    fig.suptitle("Spatial projection per TMA core", fontsize=16, y=0.98)

    for row in range(rows):
        for col in range(cols):
            ax = axes[row, col]
            core = f"{rows_labels[row]}-{cols_labels[col]}"
            subset = adata[adata.obs["tma_label"] == core]
            if subset.n_obs == 0:
                ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{core}\n(empty)", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=8, color="gray")
                ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
                ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
                ax.set_xticks([])
                ax.set_yticks([])
                continue
            coords = subset.obsm.get("spatial", subset.obsm["spatial_um"])
            coords_c = coords - coords.mean(axis=0)
            leiden_vals = subset.obs["leiden"].values
            for cluster in subset.obs["leiden"].unique():
                mask = leiden_vals == cluster
                ax.scatter(
                    coords_c[mask, 0], coords_c[mask, 1],
                    c=[cluster_colors[cluster]], s=size,
                    edgecolors="none", alpha=0.7, label=cluster,
                )
            ax.set_title(core, fontsize=9)
            ax.set_aspect("equal")
            ax.set_xticks([])
            ax.set_yticks([])
    plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
    plt.show()
```

```{python}
marker_list_heatmap = [
    "CD3e", "CD4", "CD8", "CD45RO", "TCF-1", "CD45",
    "LAG3", "TOX", "CD39", "FOXP3", "CD38",
    "PD-1", "ICOS",
    "CD56", "CD57", "Granzyme B",
    "CD20", "CD79a", "Bcl-2", "CD21", "Ki67",
    "CD11b", "CD11c", "CD68", "CD163", "CD14", "CD66", "MPO",
    "CD206", "CD209", "IDO1", "iNOS",
    "PD-L1", "VISTA", "HLA-DR", "HLA-A",
    "CD31", "CD34", "Collagen IV", "Podoplanin",
    "SMA", "Vimentin", "Caveolin",
    "Pan-Cytokeratin", "EpCAM",
    "Keratin 14", "Keratin 5", "E-cadherin", "b-Catenin1",
    "TP63", "SOX2", "GP100", "ER",
    "PCNA", "Ki67", "Histone H3 (p Ser28)",
    "CD44", "CD107a", "IFNG", "Beta-actin",
]
```

## Results {.panel-tabset}

### Reference (no filter)

```{python}
adata = sc.read_h5ad("data/adata_processed_v2.h5ad")
print(adata)
print(f"Unique clusters: {sorted(adata.obs['leiden'].unique())}")
print(f"Unique cores: {list(adata.obs['tma_label'].unique())}")
```

#### UMAP colored by Leiden cluster

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], legend_loc="on data", legend_fontsize=8)
```

#### UMAP colored by TMA core

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="tma_label", legend_loc="right margin", legend_fontsize=6)
```

#### UMAP faceted by TMA core

```{python}
for core_label in adata.obs["tma_label"].cat.categories:
    subset = adata[adata.obs["tma_label"] == core_label]
    sc.pl.umap(subset, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], title=core_label, show=False)
```

#### Cell type composition per TMA core

```{python}
ct = pd.crosstab(adata.obs["tma_label"], adata.obs["leiden"], normalize="index") * 100
ct.index.name = None
colors = plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"][:ct.shape[1]]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 6))
ct.plot.bar(stacked=True, ax=ax, color=colors, width=0.85, legend=False)
ax.set_ylabel("% of cells per core")
ax.set_title("Leiden cluster composition per TMA core")
ax.legend(title="Cluster", bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1), loc="upper left", fontsize=8, title_fontsize=9)
for tick in ax.get_xticklabels():
    tick.set_rotation(45)
    tick.set_ha("right")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

#### Marker expression by cluster

```{python}
markers = [m for m in marker_list_heatmap if m in adata.var_names]
sc.pl.matrixplot(adata, groupby="leiden", var_names=markers, cmap="RdYlBu_r", swap_axes=False, use_raw=False, standard_scale="var", colorbar_title="", show=True)
```

#### Spatial projection in TMA grid layout

```{python}
plot_spatial_grid(adata, rows=10, cols=4, dpi=120, size=0.8)
```

### Tissue mask filter

```{python}
adata = sc.read_h5ad("data/adata_tissue_v2.h5ad")
print(adata)
print(f"Unique clusters: {sorted(adata.obs['leiden'].unique())}")
print(f"Unique cores: {list(adata.obs['tma_label'].unique())}")
```

#### UMAP colored by Leiden cluster

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], legend_loc="on data", legend_fontsize=8)
```

#### UMAP colored by TMA core

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="tma_label", legend_loc="right margin", legend_fontsize=6)
```

#### UMAP faceted by TMA core

```{python}
for core_label in adata.obs["tma_label"].cat.categories:
    subset = adata[adata.obs["tma_label"] == core_label]
    sc.pl.umap(subset, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], title=core_label, show=False)
```

#### Cell type composition per TMA core

```{python}
ct = pd.crosstab(adata.obs["tma_label"], adata.obs["leiden"], normalize="index") * 100
ct.index.name = None
colors = plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"][:ct.shape[1]]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 6))
ct.plot.bar(stacked=True, ax=ax, color=colors, width=0.85, legend=False)
ax.set_ylabel("% of cells per core")
ax.set_title("Leiden cluster composition per TMA core")
ax.legend(title="Cluster", bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1), loc="upper left", fontsize=8, title_fontsize=9)
for tick in ax.get_xticklabels():
    tick.set_rotation(45)
    tick.set_ha("right")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

#### Marker expression by cluster

```{python}
markers = [m for m in marker_list_heatmap if m in adata.var_names]
sc.pl.matrixplot(adata, groupby="leiden", var_names=markers, cmap="RdYlBu_r", swap_axes=False, use_raw=False, standard_scale="var", colorbar_title="", show=True)
```

#### Spatial projection in TMA grid layout

```{python}
plot_spatial_grid(adata, rows=10, cols=4, dpi=120, size=0.8)
```

### Core circle 80% filter

```{python}
adata = sc.read_h5ad("data/adata_core_v2.h5ad")
print(adata)
print(f"Unique clusters: {sorted(adata.obs['leiden'].unique())}")
print(f"Unique cores: {list(adata.obs['tma_label'].unique())}")
```

#### UMAP colored by Leiden cluster

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], legend_loc="on data", legend_fontsize=8)
```

#### UMAP colored by TMA core

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="tma_label", legend_loc="right margin", legend_fontsize=6)
```

#### UMAP faceted by TMA core

```{python}
for core_label in adata.obs["tma_label"].cat.categories:
    subset = adata[adata.obs["tma_label"] == core_label]
    sc.pl.umap(subset, color="leiden", palette=plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"], title=core_label, show=False)
```

#### Cell type composition per TMA core

```{python}
ct = pd.crosstab(adata.obs["tma_label"], adata.obs["leiden"], normalize="index") * 100
ct.index.name = None
colors = plt.rcParams["axes.prop_cycle"].by_key()["color"][:ct.shape[1]]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 6))
ct.plot.bar(stacked=True, ax=ax, color=colors, width=0.85, legend=False)
ax.set_ylabel("% of cells per core")
ax.set_title("Leiden cluster composition per TMA core")
ax.legend(title="Cluster", bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1), loc="upper left", fontsize=8, title_fontsize=9)
for tick in ax.get_xticklabels():
    tick.set_rotation(45)
    tick.set_ha("right")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

#### Marker expression by cluster

```{python}
markers = [m for m in marker_list_heatmap if m in adata.var_names]
sc.pl.matrixplot(adata, groupby="leiden", var_names=markers, cmap="RdYlBu_r", swap_axes=False, use_raw=False, standard_scale="var", colorbar_title="", show=True)
```

#### Spatial projection in TMA grid layout

```{python}
plot_spatial_grid(adata, rows=10, cols=4, dpi=120, size=0.8)
```
